issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1329: remaining Python asset sweep 9/10

branch.name: main
branch.latest_commit: resolve with `git rev-parse --short origin/big-go-1329` at the published branch tip

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1329 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `aea0831f`.
Direct pushes to `origin/main` were racing with parallel heartbeat traffic, so the published lane branch is `origin/big-go-1329`.
